label: 57_digital euro_digital_euro_bank money
description: The European Central Bank investigates the digital euro as a means of payment, involving public and private sectors. Key figures like Fabio Panetta, Joachim Nagel, and Pablo Hernández de Cos discuss its role and implications for monetary policy.
